content.en:
The Flame Splitting Demon Lord and the Blood Chen Demon Lord came to the Heavenly Blood Realm to store the Heavenly Blood Deduction Tablet.

Soon.

The Flame Crack Demon Lord began to deduce.

Rumble!!!!!!

A strange wave began to sweep across the entire Heavenly Blood Realm and the countless surrounding areas.

"Deduction!"

The Flame Crack Demon Lord continued to deduce, and it took a long time to finally deduce.

"Damn, Blood Chen Demon Lord, that Blood Huangzi is not your descendant at all, but the Supreme Dao Realm of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, I sensed the connection between the Blood Huangzi and the Innate Origin Domain Alliance. The Flame Crack Demon Lord was furious.

"What!"

The Blood Chen Demon Lord was also annoyed, he was actually fooled by the Supreme Dao Realm of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

The point is, the other party still has to walk so many Blood Curse Heavenly Stones.

No matter how spicy and useless the Blood Curse Heavenly Stone is, it is also a fourth-sequence Supreme Dao rule item!

"Can you deduce who did it?" asked the Blood Chen Demon Lord.

"That suicidal Dao Realm, I know who it is, it's Ye Tian of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance!"

The Flame Cracker Demon Lord Dao.

"Ye Tian, that demon who killed many of us during the war, the eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon and even the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon? It is said that this guy has a lot of clones, and he is very difficult!"

"Yes, it's this guy, that's why he's not afraid of losing a clone!" said the Flame Cracker Demon Lord.

This kind of strong man with many clones is difficult to kill, the key is that Ye Tian's clone is exactly the same as the main body, and he can't tell if it's a clone at all, so he can't kill it!

The Flame Splitting Demon Lord didn't dare to go to the Innate Origin Domain Alliance to kill Ye Tian in person, otherwise he wouldn't be able to kill Ye Tian, and he would have to die.

"Xu Guang is dead, and he has to report it to the pulse master. "

The Flame Cracker Demon Lord Dao.

"Hmm!"

The Blood Demon Lord nodded.

In short, they are going to be scolded.

Soon.

They met the Heavenly Blood Vein Master, the Blood Lake Demon Venerable!

"Pulse Master!"

The two demon lords of Yan Crack and Blood Chen said respectfully.

"Xu Guang is dead?" said the Blood Lake Demon Venerable coldly.

"Yes!" both the Flame Cracker Demon Lord and the Blood Chen Demon Lord trembled slightly.

"Humph!"

The Blood Lake Demon Venerable snorted coldly, and the two demon lords both spit out a mouthful of blood, and the injuries were not light.

"This is punishment!" "Blood Lake Demon Venerable said coldly: "Flame Splitting Demon Lord, your fault is even greater, you know that when it comes to the critical moment, you should always guard Xu Guang, he went out, and you didn't follow." "

"I thought I was on my own turf and should be fine. "

The Flame Cracker Demon Lord whispered.

"Do you think that the Innate Origin Alliance has always wanted to kill Xu Guang, do you think they don't dare to sneak in?" The Blood Lake Demon Venerable was furious, if it weren't for the Flame Splitting Demon Lord who was an important combat force of the Heavenly Blood Blood, he would definitely kill him.

"Pulse Master, Xu Guang is so important, do you want to resurrect him?"

The Blood Demon Lord asked.

"Resurrection?" the Blood Lake Demon Venerable sneered, "You should know what the price of resurrecting an eightfold Supreme Dao Realm is, if it is an ordinary creature, you and I can be resurrected at will." But an eightfold supreme realm, sacrificing our lives can't be resurrected, and we must invite those who have moved the Demon Gu lineage to have any hope of resurrection. And their resurrection will come at an unimaginable cost, do you think they will?"

The Blood Demon Lord and the Flame Crack Demon Lord stopped talking.

......

In the void.

Ye Tian shuttled non-stop, and changed several identities halfway, and when he was close to the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, he changed to his real body to copy his body.

"There was no pursuit, I ran away in advance, the distance was very far, no matter how much they tracked it, it was impossible to track it. "

Ye Tian continued to shuttle and came to the Winter Night Fortress, and then he breathed a sigh of relief.

The Supreme Void.

Ye Tian submitted the assignment and is currently in the review stage.

Soon after.

The review of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance was over, and it was determined that Xu Guang had died, and only then did it be determined that Ye Tian had completed the direct assignment and was rewarded.

Such a task is already highly rewarded.

【1,000,000 Eternity Coins】

【A Nine-Pattern Zhidao Weapon Spear】

One Fifth Sequence Supreme Rule Item

Even the Qin clan did not dare to covet such a reward.

"That's right, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance is quite generous!" Ye Tian smiled.

Meanwhile.

Qin.

Qin Ming knew that Ye Tian had completed the task, and he was dumbfounded.

"How did he do it, Xu Guang is under the protection of the Heavenly Blood Vein, even if he is a patriarch, don't want to complete the task!" Qin Ming said in confusion.

And at this very moment.

He had received a warning from the Innate Origin Domain Alliance that he was no longer allowed to secretly deal with Ye Tian.

Moreover, the elder of the Qin clan was also punished.

After all, Ye Tian has made a great contribution this time, and for the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, some expressions must be made.

Qin Ming was annoyed, but he didn't dare to do anything else.

......

After Ye Tian came back, he continued to use the Blood Curse Heavenly Stone to comprehend the rules of the Fourth Sequence of the Supreme Dao, he didn't have the heart to retaliate against Qin Ming now, it was just a Qin Ming, there was no threat to him.

When he becomes strong in the future, he is not afraid of the Qin clan, so he will naturally kill Qin Ming casually.

But now, the Qin clan is still too strong, and there is no need for him to provoke the Qin clan.

Unconsciously.

Another 100,000 years of the Dao Era have passed.

And Ye Tian had already exhausted all those Blood Curse Heavenly Stones, and the fourth sequence to the Dao Rule Realm skyrocketed, reaching the realm of eighty percent seven.

"It's a pity that there is no way to get all the blood curse heavenly stones of the Heavenly Blood Vein, otherwise you can definitely comprehend the fourth sequence of Dao rules to the Ten Percent Perfection Realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.

After the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao rules rose sharply, his cultivation speed also increased, and the speed of refining resources was even faster.

According to his estimates, with another hundred thousand Dao Era years, he could definitely raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the Sevenfold Dao Realm.

"An elder looking for me?"

Ye Tian entered the Supreme Void and met an elder of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, the Longyan Ancient Emperor!

When he saw this elder, Ye Tian sensed the terrifying aura on his body, this was the will power was too strong, resulting in the formation of a terrifying coercion in the Supreme Void.

"I've seen the Ancient Emperor of Longyan!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The Longyan Ancient Emperor smiled and said, "Ye Tian, you are very good, you have made great contributions to the Innate Origin Domain Alliance some time ago. In addition, the Qin clan, we have already warned. I came to you this time because I had a good thing to tell you. "

"Longyan Ancient Emperor, please speak. "

Ye Tian listened.

"Not long ago, we found a treasure land, which contained a strange energy, forming an energy lake, this energy is easy to refine, and can greatly improve cultivation. You are still some distance away from the peak of the Sevenfold Dao Realm now, and if you go there to cultivate, you can be promoted to the peak of the Sevenfold Dao Realm by hundreds of Dao Epochs at most. With your Supreme Dao Rule Realm, you should be able to quickly break through to the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, and the energy there will stabilize your realm. "Longyan Ancient Emperor Road.

"Thank you Longyan Ancient Emperor!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
